name: IGeometryNode
summary: The IGeometryNode interface represents geometry tree node. This is implemented by concrete classes for the various types of geometry nodes

methods.name: AcceptVisitor
methods.summary: Entry method for the visitor pattern

methods.name: Clone
methods.summary: Creates a new object that is a copy of the current instance.

returns.doc: A new object that is a copy of the current instance.

properties.name: IsAutomatic
properties.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this geometry node was automatically generated (i.e. false if it was originally a user-defined part)
